span.p:
tests/test_env.py
- reset() returns valid obs
- step() validates actions
- task cycling works
- state() returns correct dict

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
tests/test_graders.py
- criticality exact match
- severity partial credit
- root cause + assignee
- related categories
- edge cases

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Criticality
CRITICAL_KEYWORDS:
crash, security, segfault,
data loss, regression...

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Severity 1-5
SEVERITY_LABEL_MAP:
p0->5, p1->4, p2->3,
p3->2, trivial->1

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Root Cause
ROOT_CAUSE_KEYWORDS:
bug, performance, environment,
design, documentation, external

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Assignee
closed_by user
or issue author

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
src/github_fetcher.py
- GitHubFetcher class
- fetch_issues()
- fetch_comments_parallel()
- process_raw_to_structured()
- label_ground_truth()
- run_full_pipeline()

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
src/utils.py
- load_json() / save_json()
- validate_bug_entry()
- validate_dataset()
- get_data_distribution()

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bug Report Triage - Full Architecture
Team Dhurandhar | OpenEnv Hackathon

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
src/env.py
- BugTriageEnv class
- reset() -> BugTriageObservation
- step(action) -> (obs, reward, done, info)
- state() -> dict
- _grade() dispatcher

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
src/tasks.py
- TASK_DEFINITIONS dict
- get_all_task_ids()
- validate_task_id()
- get_required_fields()

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
src/reward.py
- RewardCalculator class
- compute(base_score, action, gt)
- confidence_bonus
- reasoning_bonus
- edge_case_bonus

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
inference.py
- call_llm(system, user)
- run_task(env, task_id, episodes)
- main()
- 3 system prompts
- DEFAULTS fallback

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dockerfile
- python:3.11-slim
- pip install requirements
- CMD python inference.py
- EXPOSE 7860

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
openenv.yaml
- entry_point: src.env
- class: BugTriageEnv
- 3 task definitions
- deployment: HF Spaces

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
README.md
- Setup instructions
- Task descriptions
- Baseline scores
- Architecture diagram

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
src/models.py
- CriticalityLabel enum
- SeverityLevel enum
- RootCauseCategory enum
- BugReport
- BugTriageObservation
- BugTriageAction
- BugTriageReward
- BugGroundTruth

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
requirements.txt
- pydantic, openai, requests
- python-dotenv, PyGithub
- pytest, pytest-cov

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GitHub REST API
5 repos:
- pytorch/pytorch
- pallets/flask
- tiangolo/fastapi
- numpy/numpy
- python/cpython

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GitHubFetcher.run_full_pipeline()
1. fetch_issues() x5 repos (parallel)
2. fetch_comments_parallel()
3. process_raw_to_structured()
4. label_ground_truth() (keyword heuristics)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
data/contributors.json
Per-repo contributor lists
+ team names
6.6KB

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
BugTriageEnv.__init__()
- Load bugs_processed.json
- Shuffle with seed=42
- Init RewardCalculator
- Set task cycling

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
reset(task_id=None)
- Cycle to next task
- Select next bug
- Parse BugGroundTruth (hidden)
- Build BugReport
- Get available_assignees
- Return BugTriageObservation

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
step(action: BugTriageAction)
- Validate task_id match
- Validate bug_id match
- Call _grade() dispatcher
- Call reward_calculator.compute()
- Return (obs, reward, done, info)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_grade() dispatcher
task_criticality -> grade_criticality()
task_severity -> grade_severity()
task_root_cause_assignee -> grade_root_cause_assignee()

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
grade_severity(action, gt)
Exact: 1.0 | Off-by-1: 0.7
Off-by-2: 0.4 | Off-by-3+: 0.0

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
grade_root_cause_assignee(action, gt)
0.6 x root_cause_score:
exact=1.0, related=0.5, wrong=0.0
0.4 x assignee_score:
exact=1.0, same_team=0.6, wrong=0.0

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RewardCalculator.compute()
base_score (from grader)
+ confidence_bonus (±0.08/0.02/-0.05)
+ reasoning_bonus (+0.05/+0.02/0.0)
+ edge_case_bonus (+0.10)
= total (clamped 0.0-1.0)

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
main()
for task in [criticality, severity, root_cause_assignee]:
print [START]
run_task(env, task_id, 60 episodes)
print [END] with avg score

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
run_task(env, task_id, num_episodes)
for ep in range(num_episodes):
1. obs = env.reset(task_id)
2. Build user_prompt from bug
3. call_llm() with task prompt
4. Parse response -> BugTriageAction
5. obs, reward, done, info = env.step(action)
6. Print [STEP]

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
call_llm(system_prompt, user_prompt)
- OpenAI chat.completions.create()
- Strip markdown fences
- Regex JSON extraction
- Return parsed dict or error

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
DEFAULTS fallback
If LLM fails:
criticality -> non_critical
severity -> 3
root_cause -> bug

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Groq API
https://api.groq.com/openai/v1
Model: llama-3.1-8b-instant
Temperature: 0.3
Max tokens: 300
Timeout: 30s

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
System Prompts
1. CRITICALITY: critical/non_critical
2. SEVERITY: score 1-5
3. TRIAGE: root_cause + assignee
All with few-shot examples + CoT

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Docker Build
python:3.11-slim
pip install requirements.txt
COPY src/ data/ inference.py
EXPOSE 7860
